name: OPQ32r
description: The Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ32r) measures 32 personality characteristics relevant to workplace performance. Assesses behavioral style, working preferences, and how a candidate is likely to perform across roles. Uses forced-choice format with item response theory. Highly reusable data for hiring and development. Available in 37 languages.

name: Verify Interactive - Numerical Reasoning
description: Adaptive numerical reasoning test measuring ability to interpret and analyze numerical data including graphs, tables, and charts. Mobile-first design. Two versions: Interactive (10 questions, 18 min) and Multiple-Choice (18 questions, 25 min). Assesses data-driven decision making.

name: Verify Interactive - Verbal Reasoning
description: Verbal reasoning test assessing ability to evaluate written information and draw logical conclusions. Multiple-choice format with 30 questions in 19 minutes. Candidates read passages and decide if statements are True, False, or Cannot Say.

name: Verify Interactive - Inductive Reasoning
description: Assesses ability to identify patterns and logical rules in sequences or sets of data. Interactive adaptive version (15 questions, 18 min) or Multiple-Choice (18 questions, 24 min). Measures abstract thinking, pattern recognition, and innovative problem solving.

name: Verify Interactive - Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures ability to draw logical conclusions from given information. Includes scheduling, planning, and syllogism tasks. Interactive adaptive (12 questions, 18 min) or Multiple-Choice (18 questions, 20 min). Strong predictor for roles requiring systematic reasoning.

name: Verify G+ (General Ability)
description: SHL's flagship general cognitive ability test combining Numerical, Inductive, and Deductive Reasoning (8 questions each). 36-minute adaptive test measuring overall mental ability and learning potential. Strong predictor of job performance across all levels.

name: Motivational Questionnaire (MQM5)
description: Assesses 18 motivational factors that affect individual performance and satisfaction at work. 150 questions in 25 minutes. Identifies what conditions motivate a candidate and predicts engagement, retention, and cultural fit. Used for hiring and development.

name: Situational Judgement Test - Manager
description: Behavioral assessment presenting realistic workplace scenarios for managerial roles. Candidates select best and worst responses. Measures decision-making quality, judgment, leadership potential, and interpersonal effectiveness.

name: Situational Judgement Test - Customer Service
description: Behavioral assessment for customer-facing roles. Presents realistic scenarios involving customer interactions. Measures service orientation, problem resolution, communication, and professional judgment in client-facing situations.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Multi-choice knowledge test measuring Java 8 programming skills including OOP concepts, collections framework, streams API, lambda expressions, functional interfaces, concurrency, and exception handling. For mid-level to senior Java developers.

name: Core Java (Advanced Level)
description: Advanced Java knowledge test covering design patterns, multithreading, JVM internals, memory management, performance tuning, and advanced concurrency. Designed for senior Java developers and architects.

name: Python (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring Python programming knowledge including syntax, data structures, OOP, functional programming, file I/O, error handling, and standard libraries. For Python developers across experience levels.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Tests JavaScript knowledge including ES6+, DOM manipulation, async programming (Promises, async/await), closures, prototypes, and modern framework patterns. For frontend and full-stack developers.

name: SQL (New)
description: Multi-choice knowledge test covering SQL fundamentals, complex joins, subqueries, aggregation, window functions, indexing, and database optimization. Applicable to relational databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server).

name: C# (New)
description: Tests C# programming knowledge including .NET framework, LINQ, async/await, OOP principles, generics, delegates, events, and .NET Core concepts. For .NET developers.

name: .NET Framework 4.5
description: Tests knowledge of the .NET Framework including CLR, ASP.NET, WCF, Entity Framework, and .NET application development. Covers both framework fundamentals and enterprise application patterns.

name: Spring (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of Spring Framework including Spring Core, Spring Boot, AOP, IOC container, dependency injection, Spring MVC, and transaction management. For Java enterprise developers.

name: RESTful Web Services (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring knowledge of REST architecture, HTTP methods, handling requests, producing responses, entity translation, working with return types, security, filters, and interceptors. Covers API design best practices.

name: Automata - Fix (Coding Simulation)
description: Coding simulation where candidates debug and fix existing code. Assesses real-world debugging skills, code comprehension, and problem-solving. Available for multiple languages (Java, Python, JavaScript, C#). Measures practical coding ability beyond theoretical knowledge.

name: Automata Pro (Full Coding Simulation)
description: Comprehensive coding simulation requiring candidates to write complete solutions to programming problems from scratch. Tests algorithmic thinking, code quality, and software engineering skills. Highly predictive of on-the-job coding performance.

name: Technology Job Focused Assessment
description: Behavioral and cognitive assessment tailored specifically for technology roles. Evaluates competencies critical for tech professionals including analytical thinking, attention to detail, collaboration, and learning agility in technical environments.

name: Graduate 8.0 (International)
description: Comprehensive graduate assessment solution combining cognitive ability tests and OPQ personality questionnaire. Designed for graduate-level hiring. Assesses verbal, numerical, and inductive reasoning alongside personality fit. International version.

name: Verify - Following Instructions
description: Tests ability to follow detailed written instructions and select correct courses of action based on a set of rules. Assesses attention to detail, rule compliance, and procedural accuracy. Important for roles with strict processes.

name: Numerical Reasoning (Entry Level)
description: Entry-level numerical reasoning test assessing basic mathematical ability for operational and administrative roles. Tests arithmetic, percentages, ratios, and basic data interpretation appropriate for non-analytical roles.

name: Verify - Calculation
description: Tests basic numerical calculation abilities including arithmetic operations, order of operations, and error identification. 10-minute test for entry-level positions. Measures speed and accuracy in numerical computation.

name: Verify - Mechanical Comprehension
description: 10-minute test measuring understanding of basic mechanical principles including cranks, levers, toothed wheels, pulleys, and hydraulics. Required for technical and engineering roles involving physical equipment.

name: Verify - Spatial Reasoning
description: 15-minute non-verbal spatial reasoning test assessing 3D visualization, mental rotation, and spatial orientation. Entirely shape and figure-based. Predicts performance in engineering, design, and technical roles.

name: Workplace English Language Test
description: Assesses English language proficiency in a workplace context including reading, listening, and writing. Evaluates grammar, vocabulary, and business communication skills. Available for candidates where English is a second language.

name: RemoteWorkQ
description: Personality assessment measuring suitability and capability for remote/hybrid work. Evaluates self-discipline, digital communication, autonomy, isolation resilience, and remote collaboration effectiveness.

name: Sales Solution 7.1
description: Combined assessment for sales roles including personality and cognitive measures. Evaluates drive, resilience, customer focus, persuasiveness, and numerical ability relevant to sales performance.

name: Contact Center Solution
description: Assessment bundle for contact center and customer support roles. Measures typing speed, attention to detail, customer service orientation, verbal reasoning, and behavioral fit for high-volume interaction roles.

name: Smart Interview On-Demand
description: AI-powered video interview platform that provides structured on-demand video interviews. Candidates record responses to structured questions. AI scoring on communication, content quality, and role-specific competencies. Provides candidate feedback.

name: Universal Competency Framework (UCF) 360
description: Multi-rater 360-degree feedback tool based on SHL's Universal Competency Framework. Collects structured feedback from managers, peers, and direct reports. Generates data visualizations for development planning and leadership assessment.

name: Microsoft Excel (Intermediate Level)
description: Tests practical knowledge of Microsoft Excel at intermediate level including formulas, pivot tables, VLOOKUP, conditional formatting, data validation, charts, and basic macros.

name: Microsoft Word (Intermediate Level)
description: Tests working knowledge of Microsoft Word including formatting, styles, mail merge, track changes, tables, and document management. For administrative and business professional roles.

name: Data Entry Speed & Accuracy
description: Simulation-based assessment measuring speed and accuracy in data entry tasks. Tests numeric and alphanumeric data entry, transcription accuracy, and keyboarding speed. For roles requiring high-volume data processing.

name: R Programming (New)
description: Multi-choice test measuring R programming knowledge including data manipulation, statistical analysis, visualization with ggplot2, tidyverse packages, and machine learning concepts. For data science and analytics roles.

name: Machine Learning (New)
description: Tests knowledge of machine learning concepts including supervised and unsupervised learning, model evaluation, feature engineering, common algorithms (regression, trees, clustering), and model deployment. For ML engineers and data scientists.

name: Filing - Names (R1)
description: Tests ability to alphabetically sort and file names. Presents four folder tabs (three with alphabetized names, one blank) and requires selecting where a new name belongs. Measures clerical accuracy and alphabetical reasoning.

name: Workplace Safety Assessment
description: Behavioral assessment measuring safety-oriented behaviors and attitudes for operational and industrial roles. Covers following procedures, use of protective equipment, safe operation of machinery, and taking action in unsafe situations.

name: Agile Software Development (New)
description: Multi-choice test assessing knowledge of Agile methodologies including Scrum, Kanban, sprint planning, retrospectives, user stories, and Agile project management principles. For developers, scrum masters, and product managers.

name: HTML/CSS (New)
description: Tests knowledge of HTML5 and CSS3 including semantic markup, responsive design, Flexbox, Grid, CSS animations, accessibility standards, and cross-browser compatibility.

name: AWS (Amazon Web Services) Knowledge
description: Assesses knowledge of AWS services including EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, VPC, IAM, and cloud architecture principles. Tests cloud deployment, security, and scalability concepts relevant to cloud engineers.

name: Docker and Kubernetes
description: Tests knowledge of containerization with Docker and orchestration with Kubernetes. Covers container lifecycle, images, networking, Kubernetes pods, deployments, services, and CI/CD pipeline integration.

name: Leadership Assessment Solution
description: Comprehensive multi-measure leadership assessment combining OPQ personality, cognitive ability (Verify G+), and 360 feedback. Identifies leadership potential, style, derailers, and development needs. For succession planning and senior hires.
